pi_items.source: WooCommerce Code Reference (https://woocommerce.github.io/code-reference/files/woocommerce-includes-admin-settings-class-wc-settings-accounts.html); verified in setup_task.sh line 24 and export_result.sh line 21; GDPR best practices require disabling guest checkout to force account creation

WooCommerce Code Reference confirms 'woocommerce_enable_checkout_login_reminder' option exists; verified in setup_task.sh line 25 and export_result.sh line 22; displays login reminder at checkout for returning customers

WooCommerce Code Reference (https://woocommerce.github.io/code-reference/files/woocommerce-includes-admin-settings-class-wc-settings-accounts.html) confirms option exists; verified in setup_task.sh line 26 and export_result.sh line 23; allows customers to create accounts during checkout
WooCommerce Code Reference confirms option exists; verified in setup_task.sh line 27 and export_result.sh line 24; enables registration form on My Account page

WooCommerce Code Reference confirms option exists; verified in setup_task.sh line 28 and export_result.sh line 25; enables GDPR right-to-erasure for customer order data (https://woocommerce.com/posts/getting-ready-for-gdpr-right-to-erasure-requests/)
WooCommerce Code Reference confirms option exists; verified in setup_task.sh line 29 and export_result.sh line 26; enables GDPR right-to-erasure for download access logs
Sum of all scoring weights: 20 + 10 + 15 + 20 + 20 + 15 = 100 (verified in verifier.py line 158 with pass condition score >= 70)

WooCommerce uses standard 'yes'/'no' string format for checkbox options in wp_options table (https://woocommerce.github.io/code-reference/classes/WC-Settings-API.html); confirmed in all setup and export scripts using these exact string values

pi_items.verified_value: All task.json description steps align with target option values
pi_items.source: Task description step 1 = woocommerce_enable_guest_checkout:no, step 3 = woocommerce_enable_checkout_login_reminder:yes, step 4 = woocommerce_enable_signup_and_login_from_checkout:yes, step 5 = woocommerce_enable_myaccount_registration:yes, step 6 = woocommerce_erasure_request_removes_order_data:yes, step 7 = woocommerce_erasure_request_removes_download_data:yes

privileged_info_summary: The configure_accounts_privacy task requires configuring six specific WooCommerce Accounts & Privacy settings to enforce GDPR compliance: disabling guest checkout (woocommerce_enable_guest_checkout='no'), enabling checkout login reminder (woocommerce_enable_checkout_login_reminder='yes'), enabling signup and login from checkout (woocommerce_enable_signup_and_login_from_checkout='yes'), enabling My Account registration (woocommerce_enable_myaccount_registration='yes'), enabling personal data removal from orders on erasure request (woocommerce_erasure_request_removes_order_data='yes'), and enabling download access removal on erasure request (woocommerce_erasure_request_removes_download_data='yes'). All target option values use WooCommerce's standard 'yes'/'no' string format. Scoring is distributed across the six settings with weights of 20, 10, 15, 20, 20, and 15 points respectively, totaling 100 points. All data is synthetic and created programmatically within the task environment via WooCommerce database option updates.
